case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. VS. LUISA C. LAZARO et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAZARO, LUISA C. $6,799.25 PRINCIPAL, $287.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,086.75, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-18-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-18-2013 CONTINUED TO SEP-17-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE JUN-18-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 15, INCL.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. SERVED MAR-05-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAZARO, LUISA C.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $287.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $1,700.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LAZARO, LUISA C.
DECLARATION /AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 585) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 100077152) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT LAZARO, LUISA C.
DECLARATION RE: WAIVER OF PRE-JUDGMENT INTEREST & ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT LAZARO, LUISA C. DOES 1 THRU 15, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-27-2012
